English: We are reminding you to strictly adhere to the containment measures as our first line of defence against this virus; wash hands regularly with soap & running water, wearing of face masks in public places, maintaining social & physical distance, & avoiding all forms of gatherings.
Swahili: Tunakukumbusha kuzingatia kwa dhati hatua za kuzuia kama safu yetu ya kwanza ya ulinzi dhidi ya virusi hivi; osha mikono mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka, kuvaa barakoa katika maeneo ya umma, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, na kuepuka mikusanyiko ya aina zote.

English: Do’s to prevent COVID-19. Wash hands frequently. Avoid touching your eyes, nose & mouth. Cover your cough or sneeze Wear mask when outside. Stay home stay safe. Social distancing Clean & disinfect objects & surfaces to #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Mambo ya kufanya ili kuzuia COVID-19. Nawa mikono mara kwa mara. Epuka kugusa macho, pua na mdomo wako. Funika kikohozi chako au chafya Vaa barakoa ukiwa nje. Kaa nyumbani ukae salama. Umbali wa kijamii Safisha na kuua vijidudu na nyuso kwenye #KomeshaCorona

English: Key Times to Wash Hands: Before, during, & after preparing food Before eating food Before & after caring for someone sick Before & after treating a wound After using the toilet After blowing your nose, coughing, or sneezing After changing diapers...#KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Nyakati Muhimu za Kunawa Mikono: Kabla, wakati, na baada ya kuandaa chakula Kabla ya kula chakula Kabla na baada ya kumhudumia mgonjwa Kabla na baada ya kutibu jeraha Baada ya kutumia choo Baada ya kupuliza pua yako, kukohoa au kupiga chafya Baada ya kubadilisha nepi...#KomeshaCorona

English: Community health volunteers at Kangatotha CHU are sensitized on how to wash hands, in Turkana Central Sub-County, @TurkanaCountyKE . Regular handwashing with soap & running water is recommended by the @WHO as one of the best ways to prevent the spread of COVID-19. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Wafanyakazi wa kujitolea wa afya katika Kangatotha CHU wamehamasishwa kuhusu jinsi ya kunawa mikono, katika Kaunti Ndogo ya Turkana ya Kati, @TurkanaCountyKE . Kunawa mikono mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka kunapendekezwa na @WHO kama mojawapo ya njia bora za kuzuia kuenea kwa COVID-19. #KomeshaCorona

English: Let us all take responsibility to prevent the spread of COVID-19. #Wash hands often. #stay home if possible. #cover your mouth & nose with flexed elbow or tissue when coughing or sneezing #Clean & disinfect frequently touched surfaces & objects. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Sote tuchukue jukumu la kuzuia kuenea kwa COVID-19. #Nawa mikono mara kwa mara. #kaa nyumbani ikiwezekana. #funika mdomo na pua yako kwa kiwiko cha mkono au kitambaa unapokohoa au kupiga chafya #Safisha na kuua vijidudu kwenye sehemu na vitu vinavyoguswa mara kwa mara. #KomeshaCorona

English: We must observe social distancing requirement, wash hands regularly, and stay at home, and only go out when absolutely necessary. Whenever out in a public place, one must wear the face mask. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Ni lazima tuzingatie mahitaji ya umbali wa kijamii, kunawa mikono mara kwa mara, na kukaa nyumbani, na kwenda nje inapobidi tu. Wakati wowote nje mahali pa umma, mtu lazima avae kinyago cha uso. #KomeshaCorona

English: What is the best way to wash hands; Wet your hands with clean running water Use soap & lather up for 20 seconds Make sure you get in between your fingers, on the back of hands & under nails & wrists Rinse & dry well with a clean towel. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Ni ipi njia bora ya kuosha mikono; Lowesha mikono yako kwa maji safi yanayotiririka Tumia sabuni na upakae kwa muda wa sekunde 20 Hakikisha umeingia katikati ya vidole vyako, sehemu ya nyuma ya mikono na chini ya kucha na mikononi Suuza na kausha vizuri kwa taulo safi. #KomeshaCorona

English: Now meet Julius Kareno Ole Menye, from Narok county, a prime example using comedy to remind his community to stay home, wash hands & to continue keeping distance to prevent the spread of Covid-19. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Sasa kutana na Julius Kareno Ole Menye, kutoka kaunti ya Narok, mfano bora wa kutumia vichekesho kukumbusha jamii yake kukaa nyumbani, kunawa mikono na kuendelea kuweka umbali ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Covid-19. #KomeshaCorona

English: Those of us who have recovered from COVID-19, please be our ambassadors to the rest of the country. Pass a message of hope, while also instilling a sense of caution to the rest of the country. Wash hands. Sanitize. Keep social distance. Stay at home. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Wale ambao tumepona COVID-19, tafadhali tuwe mabalozi wetu kote nchini. Pitisha ujumbe wa matumaini, huku pia ukisisitiza hali ya tahadhari kwa nchi nzima. Osha mikono. Safisha. Weka umbali wa kijamii. Kaa nyumbani. #KomeshaCorona

English: We have three recoveries To flatten the curve further; Keep physical distance Frequently wash hands with soap and running water Stay at home unless you are an essential service. #StaySafe. #KomesaCorona
Swahili: Tuna ahueni tatu Ili kurefusha curve zaidi; Weka umbali wa kimwili Nawa mikono mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka Kaa nyumbani isipokuwa kama huduma muhimu. #KaaSalama. #KomesaCorona

English: CoronaVirus prevention advice! Wash hands frequently with soap and water. Avoid close contact with anyone with a fever or cough. Seek medical care early if you have cough, fever or difficulty breathing. #COVID19 #CoronaVirusKenya
Swahili: Ushauri wa kujikinga na Virusi vya Corona! Nawa mikono mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji. Epuka kuwasiliana kwa karibu na mtu yeyote aliye na homa au kikohozi. Tafuta matibabu mapema ikiwa una kikohozi, homa au kupumua kwa shida. #COVID19 #CoronaVirusKenya

English: Wear a mask, sanitize and keep social distance each time you visit health facility. #WCD2020Ke #WCD2020 #Tujulishane @MOH_DRMH @UNFPA @UNFPAKen @NAYAKenya @Amref_Kenya @NCPD_Kenya @PSKenya_
Swahili: Vaa barakoa, safisha na weka umbali wa kijamii kila unapotembelea kituo cha afya. #WCD2020Ke #WCD2020 #Tujulishane @MOH_DRMH @UNFPA @UNFPAKen @NAYAKenya @Amref_Kenya @NCPD_Kenya @PSKenya_

English: CS MUTAHI KAGWE: We must take individual responsibility to #KomeshaCorona #Washhands #WearMasks #keepsocialdistance #sanitize
Swahili: CS MUTAHI KAGWE: Lazima tuchukue jukumu la kibinafsi kwa #KomeshaCorona #Kunawa Mikono #VaaMasks #weka umbali wa kijamii #kusafisha

English: We encourage you to lower your risk of Coronavirus. practice social distancing Wash your hands with soap & running water often for 20 seconds stay at home avoid public places regularly clean & sanitize all spaces - doorknobs, phones... #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Tunakuhimiza kupunguza hatari yako ya virusi vya corona. fanya mazoezi ya umbali wa kijamii Osha mikono yako kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka mara kwa mara kwa sekunde 20 kaa nyumbani epuka maeneo ya umma safisha mara kwa mara na usafishe nafasi zote - vitasa vya milango, simu... #KomeshaCorona

English: Restaurants must; ensure quality & safety of food, rinse &sanitize food contact surfaces, disinfect surfaces, floors & counters. Install adequate portable running water & accessible washing basins for hand washing purposes, at the entrance & exit points. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Migahawa lazima; hakikisha ubora na usalama wa chakula, suuza na usafishe sehemu zinazogusa chakula, kuua viini kwenye nyuso, sakafu na kaunta. Sakinisha maji ya bomba ya kutosha na beseni za kunawia zinazoweza kufikiwa kwa madhumuni ya kunawa mikono, kwenye lango la kuingilia na kutoka. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: “Key steps to #KomeshaCorona Wash your with and flowing water Sanitize our hands Observe physical distance Avoid public gatherings” @GovernorKahiga @KenyaGovernors @County19Nyeri
Swahili: "Hatua muhimu za #KomeshaCorona Osha maji yako na yanayotiririka Safisha mikono yetu Angalia umbali wa mwili Epuka mikusanyiko ya watu" @GavanaKahiga @Magavana wa Kenya @County19Nyeri

English: . @KenyaAirports continues to disinfect and sanitise our airports in the ongoing fight against the spread of #COVID19 #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: . @KenyaAirports inaendelea kuua na kuvisafisha viwanja vyetu vya ndege katika vita vinavyoendelea dhidi ya kuenea kwa #COVID19 #KomeshaCorona

English: Contact tracing is key. Hot spots in NAIROBI county; Kawangware 13 cases Kilimani 6 cases... You need to keep distance, stay home, wear mask and wash your hands. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Ufuatiliaji wa anwani ni muhimu. Sehemu za moto katika kaunti ya NAIROBI; Kawangware Kesi 13 Kilimani Kesi 6... Unahitaji kujiweka mbali, kukaa nyumbani, kuvaa barakoa na kunawa mikono. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: CAS, Dr. Rashid Aman: Flouting of the containment measures by our people remains a major concern. The mandatory requirement of wearing a face mask in public places is not being adhered to in many parts of the Country. #COVID19Update:
Swahili: CAS, Dk. Rashid Aman: Kukiukwa kwa hatua za kuzuia na watu wetu bado ni jambo la kusumbua sana. Sharti la lazima la kuvaa barakoa katika maeneo ya umma halifuatwi katika sehemu nyingi za Nchi. #Sasisho la COVID19:

English: Let us heed the wise counsel by His Excellency the President to; wash our hands regularly, wear a face mask, maintain social distance #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Tuzingatie ushauri wa busara wa Mheshimiwa Rais; kunawa mikono mara kwa mara, kuvaa barakoa, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii #KomeshaCorona

English: Wear your face mask properly to protect yourself against the coronavirus. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Vaa kinyago chako vizuri ili kujikinga dhidi ya virusi vya corona. #KomeshaCorona

English: Let us all remember that our first line of defence to beat the virus still remains the containment measures. These are washing of hands with soap and running water, maintaining social and physical distance, wearing of face mask when in public places. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Sote tukumbuke kuwa safu yetu ya kwanza ya utetezi kupiga virusi bado inabaki kuwa hatua za kuzuia. Hizi ni kunawa mikono kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, kuvaa barakoa unapokuwa katika maeneo ya umma. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Employers are encouraged to advise, their staff & general public accessing their workplaces, to adhere to the laid down containment measures of hand washing, keeping social & physical distance, observing cough etiquette, avoiding face touching, & proper use of face mask.
Swahili: Waajiri wanahimizwa kushauri, wafanyakazi wao na umma kwa ujumla kufikia maeneo yao ya kazi, kuzingatia hatua zilizowekwa za kuzuia mikono, kuweka umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, kuzingatia adabu za kikohozi, kuepuka kugusa uso, na matumizi sahihi ya barakoa.

English: Ensure that every client entering the establishment wears a face mask. All food handlers wear face masks. Provision for social and physical distancing. All restaurant workers must be tested. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Hakikisha kuwa kila mteja anayeingia kwenye biashara amevaa kinyago. Wahudumu wote wa chakula huvaa vinyago vya uso. Utoaji wa umbali wa kijamii na kimwili. Wafanyikazi wote wa mikahawa lazima wajaribiwe. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: How to avoid spreading #COVID19 DO Stay at least 2 metres away from anyone Wash your hands often with soap & running water Cover your mouth & nose when you cough Wear face mask Don’t Do not touch your eyes, nose or mouth if your hands are not clean. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Jinsi ya kuepuka kueneza #COVID19 JE Kaa angalau mita 2 kutoka kwa mtu yeyote Osha mikono yako mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka Funika mdomo na pua unapokohoa Vaa barakoa Usiguse macho, pua au mdomo wako ikiwa mikono yako si safi. #KomeshaCorona

English: Wearing a face mask correctly can help prevent the spread of #COVID19 to others. Take action to slow the spread of #COVID19 by wearing a face mask in public, correctly. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Kuvaa barakoa kwa njia ipasavyo kunaweza kusaidia kuzuia kuenea kwa #COVID19 kwa wengine. Chukua hatua kupunguza kasi ya kuenea kwa #COVID19 kwa kuvaa barakoa hadharani, ipasavyo. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Here is what you need to know about how to wear a face mask properly. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Hapa ndio unahitaji kujua kuhusu jinsi ya kuvaa mask ya uso vizuri. #KomeshaCorona

English: How should I put on and take off a face mask? Before putting on the mask, wash your hands with soap & water or an alcohol-based hand rub. Cover your mouth and nose with the mask ensuring that it is intact and it fits snugly to your face. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Je, nivae na kuvua vipi barakoa ya uso? Kabla ya kuvaa barakoa, osha mikono yako kwa sabuni na maji au kusugua mikono iliyo na pombe. Funika mdomo na pua yako na barakoa ili kuhakikisha kwamba ni safi na inalingana vyema na uso wako. #KomeshaCorona

English: The most Important measure for epidemic prevention is to adjust social etiquette and lifestyle to reduce the chance of infection e.g. wearing a face mask should be part of normal lifestyle. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Hatua Muhimu zaidi ya kuzuia janga ni kurekebisha adabu za kijamii na mtindo wa maisha ili kupunguza uwezekano wa kuambukizwa k.m. kuvaa barakoa inapaswa kuwa sehemu ya maisha ya kawaida. #KomeshaCorona

English: You can avoid going to hospital or contracting COVID-19 if you follow instructions and use the face mask, wash your hands and maintain social distancing. 90% of the responsibility is with you; @HassanAliJoho
Swahili: Unaweza kuepuka kwenda hospitalini au kuambukizwa COVID-19 ukifuata maagizo na kutumia barakoa, kunawa mikono na kudumisha umbali wa kijamii. 90% ya jukumu liko kwako; @HassanAliJoho

English: Self protection is social protection. Take action to slow the spread of Coronavirus by wearing a face mask when you go out in the public following this advice by @janengoiri to #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kujilinda ni ulinzi wa kijamii. Chukua hatua kupunguza kasi ya kuenea kwa Coronavirus kwa kuvaa barakoa unapoenda hadharani kwa kufuata ushauri huu wa @janengoiri kwa #KomeshaCorona

English: In line with the pronouncement by the President of the importance of wearing face masks, it is critical that every Kenyan wears a face mask whilst in public spaces. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Sambamba na matamshi ya Rais ya umuhimu wa kuvaa vinyago, ni muhimu kwamba kila Mkenya avae barakoa akiwa katika maeneo ya umma. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Everybody must make an effort to wear a face mask in public places #KomeshaCorona media briefing by CS Health, Mutahi Kagwe.
Swahili: Kila mtu lazima ajitahidi kuvaa barakoa katika maeneo ya umma mkutano wa wanahabari wa #KomeshaCorona na Waziri wa Afya, Mutahi Kagwe.

English: Muranga County has launched mass distribution of masks for motorbike riders. Stay safe and ensure you wear your face mask when visiting public places such as supermarkets, open air markets & public transport to reduce the chances of transmission of the virus #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kaunti ya Muranga imezindua usambazaji mkubwa wa barakoa kwa waendesha pikipiki. Kaa salama na hakikisha unavaa barakoa unapotembelea maeneo ya umma kama vile maduka makubwa, soko la wazi na usafiri wa umma ili kupunguza uwezekano wa maambukizi ya virusi #KomeshaCorona

English: According to data provided by the National Agency for Campaign Against Drug Abuse (NACADA), about 50 per cent of the youth in Embu County, use the stimulant abandoning and breaking all social distance rules, put in place to contain the spread of Covid-19.
Swahili: Kulingana na data iliyotolewa na Shirika la Kitaifa la Kampeni Dhidi ya Matumizi Mabaya ya Dawa za Kulevya (NACADA), takriban asilimia 50 ya vijana katika Kaunti ya Embu, wanatumia kichocheo cha kutelekeza na kuvunja sheria zote za umbali wa kijamii, zilizowekwa ili kudhibiti kuenea kwa Covid-19.

English: Do I enter a place of worship without keeping social distance? Do I have to attend an illegal gathering, even if I get Covi-19? #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Je, ninaingia mahali pa ibada bila kujiweka mbali na watu wengine? Je, ni lazima nihudhurie mkusanyiko usio halali, hata nikiambukizwa COVID-19? #KomeshaCorona

English: Observe social distance, wash your hands, wear face masks and stay home if possible, to stop the virus from spreading. We are boosting capacity to monitor porous borders; Dr. Rashid Aman. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Angalia umbali wa kijamii, osha mikono yako, vaa vinyago na ukae nyumbani ikiwezekana, ili kuzuia virusi kuenea. Tunaongeza uwezo wa kufuatilia mipaka ya vinyweleo; Dk Rashid Aman. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Everyone using Commuter Train must follow measures at the Railway Station. A brand new ferry has been introduced at Likoni Ferry to ensure social distance. Flower export will be sustained by adding 12 more airlines; CS Macharia. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Kila mtu anayetumia Treni ya Kusafiria lazima afuate hatua katika Kituo cha Reli. Feri mpya kabisa imetambulishwa katika Feri ya Likoni ili kuhakikisha umbali wa kijamii. Usafirishaji wa maua utadumishwa kwa kuongeza mashirika 12 zaidi ya ndege; CS Macharia. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: We are not yet there, continue washing hands, continue working from home and observing social distance to be able to defeat this monster; Dr. Patrick Amoth, Ag. Director General. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Bado hatujafika, endelea kunawa mikono, endelea kufanya kazi kutoka nyumbani na kutazama umbali wa kijamii ili kuweza kumshinda mnyama huyu; Dk. Patrick Amoth, Ag. Mkurugenzi Mkuu. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: We have cases in kitengele, Kumulu, tana River, ongata rongai among others. Let us continue practicing social distance to prevent the spread of Coronavirus in our communities. Stay encouraged and stay safe. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Tuna kesi katika kitengele, Kumulu, tana River, ongata rongai miongoni mwa zingine. Tuendelee kufanya mazoezi ya umbali wa kijamii ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Coronavirus katika jamii zetu. Jipe moyo na ubaki salama. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Social distance is an essential way to slow down the spread of COVID-19. And it is important that you follow the social distancing recommendations in your community whether your’re in one of the high-risk groups or not. #KomeshaCorona campaign
Swahili: Umbali wa kijamii ni njia muhimu ya kupunguza kasi ya kuenea kwa COVID-19. Na ni muhimu kufuata mapendekezo ya umbali wa kijamii katika jamii yako iwe uko katika moja ya vikundi vilivyo hatarini au la. Kampeni ya #KomeshaCorona

English: PATH is currently reaching out to vulnerable Adolescent Girls & Young Women, in 51 wards covering the counties of Kisumu, HomaBay & Migori in partnership with @MOH_Kenya @PoliceKE to provide COVID-19 basic information on curfew, social distance, handwash #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: PATH kwa sasa inawafikia Wasichana na Vijana wa Kike walio katika mazingira magumu, katika wadi 51 zinazojumuisha kaunti za Kisumu, HomaBay na Migori kwa ushirikiano na @MOH_Kenya @PoliceKE kutoa taarifa za kimsingi kuhusu COVID-19 kuhusu amri ya kutotoka nje, umbali wa kijamii, unawaji mikono #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: As we continue to celebrate Easter Holidays in our homes, let us reflect on what we must do in order to contain the spread of infections & remember to wash our hands, observe social distance, wear face masks and stay at home; Dr. Mwangangi. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Tunapoendelea kusherehekea Sikukuu za Pasaka majumbani mwetu, tutafakari kile tunachopaswa kufanya ili kuzuia kuenea kwa maambukizi & tukumbuke kunawa mikono, kuangalia umbali wa kijamii, kuvaa vinyago na kukaa nyumbani; Dk Mwangangi. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Tips to Protect your Salon from Covid-19; Provide hand sanitiser at the salon door outline your appointment policies at the door Wash your hands often with an alcohol-based hand sanitizer Keep social distance Use face masks both you & your client #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Vidokezo vya Kulinda Saluni yako dhidi ya Covid-19; Toa dawa ya kusafisha mikono kwenye mlango wa saluni onyesha sera zako za miadi mlangoni Nawa mikono yako mara kwa mara kwa kisafisha mikono chenye pombe. Weka umbali wa kijamii Tumia barakoa za uso wewe na mteja wako #KomeshaCorona

English: We appeal to the youth to complement the Government efforts. We also urge the market vendors, barbers, salonists and matatu operators to keep in mind our past conversation to wear masks and keep social distance. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Tunatoa wito kwa vijana kuunga mkono juhudi za Serikali. Pia tunawahimiza wachuuzi wa soko, vinyozi, saluni na waendeshaji matatu kukumbuka mazungumzo yetu ya awali ya kuvaa vinyago na kuweka umbali wa kijamii. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Kitui County Health Promotion officers are doing a great job to educate the pubic in market places on the importance of social distance and handwashing. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Maafisa wa Ukuzaji Afya wa Kaunti ya Kitui wanafanya kazi nzuri ya kuelimisha pubic katika maeneo ya soko kuhusu umuhimu wa umbali wa kijamii na unawaji mikono. #KomeshaCorona

English: Embu CHPO & CDPH sensitizing "Wanjiku" on COVID 19 at an open air market. Importance of hand hygiene & social distance were among health issues discussed. #KomesaCorona
Swahili: Embu CHPO & CDPH inahamasisha "Wanjiku" kuhusu COVID 19 katika soko la wazi. Umuhimu wa usafi wa mikono na umbali wa kijamii ni miongoni mwa masuala ya afya yaliyojadiliwa. #KomesaCorona

English: We shall not tire in reminding you of the need to wash your hands with soap and water, wearing of face masks at all times in public places, maintaining social and physical distance and more important avoiding all public gatherings be they social or political.
Swahili: Hatutachoka kukukumbusha hitaji la kunawa mikono kwa sabuni na maji, kuvaa barakoa kila wakati mahali pa umma, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili na muhimu zaidi kuepuka mikusanyiko yote ya umma iwe ya kijamii au ya kisiasa.

English: We shall not tire in reminding you, to strictly adhere to the containment measures, of washing our hands with soap and running water, maintaining social and physical distance, wearing face masks in public places at all times and avoiding all forms of gatherings. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Hatutachoka kukukumbusha, kuzingatia madhubuti hatua za kuzuia, kuosha mikono yetu kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, kuvaa vinyago vya uso katika maeneo ya umma kila wakati na kuepuka aina zote za mikusanyiko. #KomeshaCorona

English: I will not tire in reminding you of the basic containment measures. Namely: washing your hands with soap and running water, maintaining social and physical distance, wearing of face masks at all times when in public places & avoid all forms of gatherings; CS Mutahi Kagwe.
Swahili: Sitachoka kukukumbusha hatua za msingi za kuzuia. Yaani: kunawa mikono kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, kuvaa vinyago wakati wote unapokuwa katika maeneo ya umma na kuepuka aina zote za mikusanyiko; CS Mutahi Kagwe.

English: Protecting one from being infected is the most effective way of curtailing the spread of the virus. The protective measures we have been advocating include, hand washing, wearing of face masks in public places, maintaining social & physical distance, & avoiding public gatherings.
Swahili: Kumlinda mtu kutokana na kuambukizwa ndiyo njia bora zaidi ya kuzuia kuenea kwa virusi. Hatua za ulinzi ambazo tumekuwa tukitetea ni pamoja na, kunawa mikono, kuvaa barakoa katika maeneo ya umma, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, na kuepuka mikusanyiko ya watu.

English: The techniques needed to win this war, and which are known to all of us include; maintaining physical distance, hand washing, sanitizing, wearing masks at all times, avoiding crowds by staying at home, & visiting a hospital when one feels unwell. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Mbinu zinazohitajika kushinda vita hivi, na ambazo zinajulikana kwetu sote ni pamoja na; kudumisha umbali wa kimwili, kunawa mikono, kusafisha, kuvaa barakoa wakati wote, kuepuka mikusanyiko ya watu kwa kukaa nyumbani, na kutembelea hospitali wakati mtu anahisi mgonjwa. #KomeshaCorona

English: maintaining social and physical distance, wearing of face masks in public places, washing of hands with soap and running water, avoiding all public and social gatherings, among others to #KomeshaCorona.
Swahili: kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, kuvaa barakoa katika maeneo ya umma, kunawa mikono kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka, kuepuka mikusanyiko yote ya hadhara na kijamii, miongoni mwa mengine kwa #KomeshaCorona.

English: We should adhere to the containment measures, which include washing of hands, wearing of face masks at all times, maintaining social & physical distance, & avoiding public gatherings, among others; Dr. Aman. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Tunapaswa kuzingatia hatua za kuzuia, ambazo ni pamoja na kuosha mikono, kuvaa barakoa wakati wote, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, na kuepuka mikusanyiko ya watu, miongoni mwa mengine; Dk Aman. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Let us continue to observe the containment measures of hand washing, maintaining social and physical distance and wearing of face masks among others. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Wacha tuendelee kuzingatia hatua za kuzuia za kunawa mikono, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na mwili na uvaaji wa barakoa kati ya zingine. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Hand washing, sanitizing, where possible, maintaining social and physical distance, should become part of our daily lifestyles. #KomeshaCorona.
Swahili: Kuosha mikono, kusafisha, inapowezekana, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, inapaswa kuwa sehemu ya maisha yetu ya kila siku. #KomeshaCorona.

English: Let us continue to abide by the various regulations & observe the containment measures advocated for by @MOH_Kenya - Washing of hands, maintaining of social & physical distance, high standards of hygiene & proper wearing of masks, among others. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Hebu tuendelee kutii kanuni mbalimbali na kuzingatia hatua za kuzuia zinazotetewa na @MOH_Kenya - Kunawa mikono, kudumisha umbali wa kijamii na kimwili, viwango vya juu vya usafi & uvaaji ipasavyo wa barakoa, miongoni mwa mengine. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: This is the reason why you should adhere to the social and physical distance measures. #KomeshaCorona updates.
Swahili: Hii ndiyo sababu unapaswa kuzingatia hatua za umbali wa kijamii na kimwili. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Pass the message to #KomeshaCorona virus. Focus on hand washing, coughing etiquette, not touching your face, physical distance and staying home if feeling unwell.
Swahili: Tuma ujumbe kwa virusi vya #KomeshaCorona. Zingatia kunawa mikono, adabu za kukohoa, kutogusa uso wako, umbali wa kimwili na kukaa nyumbani ikiwa unajisikia vibaya.

English: I appeal to those in quarantined facilities to keep physical distance. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Ninatoa wito kwa wale walio katika vituo vilivyowekwa karantini kuweka umbali wa kimwili. #KomeshaCorona

English: The youth are our center of the fight against this disease. It is a journey that requires the youth to take responsibility, Observe and be part of the solution to fight CoVid 19 and ensure physical distance is being observed... #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Vijana ndio kitovu chetu cha mapambano dhidi ya ugonjwa huu. Ni safari inayohitaji vijana kuwajibika, Kuzingatia na kuwa sehemu ya suluhisho la kupambana na Covid 19 na kuhakikisha umbali wa mwili unazingatiwa... #KomeshaCorona

English: Those in quarantine are advised to keep physical distance #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Walio kwenye karantini wanashauriwa kuweka umbali wa kimwili #KomeshaCorona update

English: Keeping physical distance is paramount in ensuring we #KomeshaCorona with overall behavior change during this pandemic times #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kuweka umbali wa mwili ni jambo la msingi katika kuhakikisha sisi #KomeshaCorona na mabadiliko ya tabia kwa ujumla wakati huu wa janga #KomeshaCorona

English: COVID-19 has affected our mental health. Measures such as stay home, keeping social distancing including isolation has caused a lot of anxiety. But we have seen change especially in behavior such as increased hand hygiene; CS Mutahi Kagwe. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: COVID-19 imeathiri afya yetu ya akili. Hatua kama vile kukaa nyumbani, kuweka umbali wa kijamii pamoja na kutengwa kumesababisha wasiwasi mwingi. Lakini tumeona mabadiliko hasa katika tabia kama vile kuongezeka kwa usafi wa mikono; CS Mutahi Kagwe. #KomeshaCorona

English: 5-step game plan to defeat coronavirus Please wash your hands frequently. Pleaae cover your nose & mouth if you sneeze or cough Avoid touching your eyes , nose & mouth Keep 1 metre distance from everyone that coughs If you feel unwell, stay home #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Mpango wa mchezo wa hatua 5 wa kushinda coronavirus Tafadhali osha mikono yako mara kwa mara. Tafadhali funika pua na mdomo ukipiga chafya au kukohoa Epuka kugusa macho, pua na mdomo Weka umbali wa mita 1 kutoka kwa kila anayekohoa Kama unajisikia vibaya, kaa nyumbani #KomeshaCorona

English: Currently there is no vaccine to prevent COVID-19 infection. The only way to prevent it, is to avoid being exposed to the virus. avoid touching your eyes, nose & mouth. cough & sneeze into your elbow avoid handshaking stay home & wash your hands often #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kwa sasa hakuna chanjo ya kuzuia maambukizi ya COVID-19. Njia pekee ya kuzuia, ni kuepuka kuwa wazi kwa virusi. epuka kugusa macho, pua na mdomo wako. kohoa na kupiga chafya kwenye kiwiko cha mkono epuka kupeana mikono kaa nyumbani na osha mikono yako mara kwa mara #KomeshaCorona

English: As you stay home to #KomeshaCorona try to add the following anti-viral and immune-boosting herbs and spices to the meals you prepare for yourself and your family: *Chili pepper, oregano , rosemary, or turmeric. *Fresh garlic and ginger.
Swahili: Unapokaa nyumbani kwa #KomeshaCorona jaribu kuongeza mimea na viungo vifuatavyo vya kuzuia virusi na kuongeza kinga kwenye milo unayojiandalia wewe na familia yako: *Pilipili Chili, oregano , rosemary, au manjano. *Kitunguu saumu safi na tangawizi.

English: Some measures you can take to avoid close contact with others include: Stay home as much as possible & reduce visitors. Practice social & physical distancing: Stay at least six feet away from others in public places. Call friends & family or visit by video. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Baadhi ya hatua unazoweza kuchukua ili kuepuka kuwasiliana kwa karibu na wengine ni pamoja na: Kaa nyumbani iwezekanavyo na upunguze wageni. Fanya mazoezi ya umbali wa kijamii na kimwili: Kaa angalau futi sita kutoka kwa wengine katika maeneo ya umma. Piga marafiki na familia au tembelea kwa video. #KomeshaCorona

English: The collective fight against #COVID19 gives hope that we shall overcome. A great future awaits us. Asante @magicalkenya for the inspiration. Let us believe and achieve. Stay home. Slow the spread. Save lives. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Mapambano ya pamoja dhidi ya #COVID19 yanatoa matumaini kwamba tutashinda. Wakati ujao mzuri unatungoja. Asante @magicalkenya kwa msukumo. Tuamini na tufanikiwe. Kaa nyumbani. Punguza kuenea. Okoa maisha. #KomeshaCorona

English: The Church in Kenya, in response to government advice, has put worship on hold to help prevent the spread of COVID-19. We urge you sisters & brothers to become a different sort of church & take everyday preventive steps to wash your hands frequently & stay home. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kanisa nchini Kenya, kwa kuitikia ushauri wa serikali, limesimamisha ibada ili kusaidia kuzuia kuenea kwa COVID-19. Tunawasihi nyinyi akina dada na ndugu kuwa aina tofauti ya kanisa na kuchukua hatua za kila siku za kuzuia kunawa mikono mara kwa mara na kukaa nyumbani. #KomeshaCorona

English: General advice! Wearing a medical mask is one of the preventive measures to limit spread of certain respiratory diseases, including COVID-19. The use of masks must be combined with hand hygiene, social distancing, stay home, clean surfaces & other measures. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Ushauri wa jumla! Kuvaa barakoa ya matibabu ni moja wapo ya hatua za kuzuia kuzuia kuenea kwa magonjwa fulani ya kupumua, pamoja na COVID-19. Matumizi ya barakoa lazima yaunganishwe na usafi wa mikono, umbali wa kijamii, kukaa nyumbani, nyuso safi na hatua zingine. #KomeshaCorona

English: COVID-19 is real & it is here with us. There is hope because we have four recoveries. We must therefore play our part. Stay Home. Practice Physical distancing. Wash your hands often. Cover your coughs & sneezes. Clean & disinfect surfaces. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: COVID-19 ni halisi na iko hapa pamoja nasi. Kuna matumaini kwa sababu tumepona mara nne. Kwa hiyo ni lazima tutekeleze sehemu yetu. Kaa Nyumbani. Fanya mazoezi ya umbali wa Kimwili. Osha mikono yako mara kwa mara. Funika kikohozi chako na chafya. Safisha na kuua vijidudu kwenye nyuso. #KomeshaCorona

English: COVID-19 is spreading very first in our community. Today we have 22 new cases. Let us quarantine ourselves and stay home to protect each other; CS Mutahi. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: COVID-19 inaenea kwanza kabisa katika jamii yetu. Leo tuna kesi 22 mpya. Tujiweke karantini na tukae nyumbani kulindana; CS Mutahi. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: “I was tested for coronvirus and the results are negative. Let’s stay home and keep distance to protect ourselves and our families,” CS Mutahi Kagwe #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: "Nilipimwa virusi vya corona na matokeo yake ni hasi. Tukae nyumbani na tuweke umbali ili kujilinda sisi wenyewe na familia zetu," CS Mutahi Kagwe #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Every day that you practice social distancing during the pandemic, you’re doing someone else (maybe hundreds or even thousands) a great kindness. So if you can, stay home. It’s the easiest act of heroism you’ll ever do #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kila siku unapofanya mazoezi ya kutengwa kwa jamii wakati wa janga hili, unamfanyia mtu mwingine (labda mamia au hata maelfu) wema mkubwa. Kwa hivyo ikiwa unaweza, kaa nyumbani. Ni tendo rahisi zaidi la ushujaa utawahi kufanya #KomeshaCorona

English: Stay home and wash your hands with soap and running water for at least 20 Seconds to #KomeshaCorona , Dr. Mercy Mwangangi, Chief Administration Secretary , Ministry of Health katika Janga la Corona @K24Tv now live .
Swahili: Kaa nyumbani na unawe mikono kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka kwa angalau Sekunde 20 hadi #KomeshaCorona , Dk. Mercy Mwangangi, Katibu Mkuu Utawala, Wizara ya Afya katika Janga la Corona @K24Tv sasa moja kwa moja.

English: Similarly, disruption to vaccination services can increase risk of infection, potentially leading to an overuse of antimicrobials; Dr Rashid
Swahili: Vile vile, kukatizwa kwa huduma za chanjo kunaweza kuongeza hatari ya kuambukizwa, na hivyo kusababisha matumizi makubwa ya viuavijasumu; Dk Rashid

English: @DrMercyHealth .We continue to encourage all parents & guardians to ensure that 10-year-old girls have received two doses of the HPV vaccine and Infants complete their vaccination schedule, receiving two doses of measles rubella vaccine by the time they are 2 years old.
Swahili: @DrMercyHealth .Tunaendelea kuwahimiza wazazi na walezi wote kuhakikisha kuwa wasichana wenye umri wa miaka 10 wamepata dozi mbili za chanjo ya HPV na Watoto wachanga wanakamilisha ratiba yao ya chanjo, kupokea dozi mbili za chanjo ya surua hadi kufikia umri wa miaka 2.

English: While KEMRI continues to collaborate with Astra-Zeneca and Oxford university in the trials for this vaccine, the Government remains open to other collaborative opportunities.
Swahili: Huku KEMRI ikiendelea kushirikiana na Astra-Zeneca na chuo kikuu cha Oxford katika majaribio ya chanjo hii, Serikali inasalia wazi kwa fursa nyingine za ushirikiano.

English: The meeting which was graced by His Excellency the President, Uhuru Kenyatta, noted the increasing significance of a viable vaccine in the containment of the spread of Covid-19.
Swahili: Mkutano huo ambao ulihudhuriwa na Mheshimiwa Rais, Uhuru Kenyatta, ulibainisha ongezeko la umuhimu wa chanjo inayoweza kutumika katika kuzuia kuenea kwa Covid-19.

English: Dr. Rashid. @KEMRI_Kenya is also involved in the development of COVID-19 diagnostic products & clinical trials , testing the safety & efficiency of potential therapeutic drugs & vaccine candidates for the pandemic.
Swahili: Dk Rashid. @KEMRI_Kenya pia inahusika katika uundaji wa bidhaa za uchunguzi wa COVID-19 na majaribio ya kimatibabu, kupima usalama na ufanisi wa dawa zinazoweza kutibiwa na waombaji chanjo ya janga hili.

English: @DrMercyHealth . The Ministry through Kenya Medical Research Institute (KEMRI) and Kenya Aids Vaccine Initiative Institute of Clinical Research (KAVI-ICR) has been on the lead on both local and international collaborative Covid-19 researches. #CoronaVirusUpdates
Swahili: @DrMercyHealth . Wizara kupitia Taasisi ya Utafiti wa Kimatibabu ya Kenya (KEMRI) na Taasisi ya Kenya Aids Vaccine Initiative Initiative (KAVI-ICR) imekuwa ikiongoza katika tafiti shirikishi za Covid-19 nchini na kimataifa. Taarifa za #CoronaVirus

English: @DrMercyHealth . Kenya & South Africa are the 2 countries in Africa who are frontiers & are looking at different vaccine trials. We have collaborations with the University of Oxford & other partners in terms of ensuring that when this vaccine is found Kenya does have a stake.
Swahili: @DrMercyHealth . Kenya na Afrika Kusini ni nchi 2 barani Afrika ambazo ziko mipakani na zinaangalia majaribio tofauti ya chanjo. Tuna ushirikiano na Chuo Kikuu cha Oxford na washirika wengine katika suala la kuhakikisha kuwa chanjo hii inapopatikana Kenya inakuwa na hisa.

English: The corona virus, as of today still has no cure, neither is there a vaccine. The only available means of defence against it is the containment measures; Mutahi Kagwe, CAS Health. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Virusi vya corona, hadi leo bado havina tiba, wala hakuna chanjo. Njia pekee inayopatikana ya ulinzi dhidi yake ni hatua za kuzuia; Mutahi Kagwe, CAS Afya. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: #COVID19 Myth Vs Fact. Myth A vaccine to cure COVID-19 is available. Fact Curently, there is no vaccine for COVID-19. Scientists have already began working on one, but developing a vaccine that is safe & effective in human beings will take many months. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Hadithi za #COVID19 Vs Ukweli. Hadithi A chanjo ya kuponya COVID-19 inapatikana. Ukweli Kwa sasa, hakuna chanjo ya COVID-19. Wanasayansi tayari wameanza kufanyia kazi moja, lakini kutengeneza chanjo ambayo ni salama na yenye ufanisi kwa binadamu itachukua miezi mingi. #KomeshaCorona

English: The H.E. will also engage on the importance of accelarating local manufacturing of vaccines & access to a future Covid-19 vaccine. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: H.E. pia itahusisha umuhimu wa kuongeza kasi ya utengenezaji wa chanjo nchini na upatikanaji wa chanjo ya baadaye ya Covid-19. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: The H.E will this afternoon join key world leaders in the Gavi Global Vaccine Summit 2020, hosted by UK Prime Minister, Rt. Hon Boris Johnson.
Swahili: The HE ataungana na viongozi wakuu wa dunia leo alasiri katika Mkutano wa kilele wa chanjo ya Gavi Global 2020, ulioandaliwa na Waziri Mkuu wa Uingereza, Rt. Mhe Boris Johnson.

English: Today, we are celebrating our partnership with @gavi , the global vaccine alliance, founded in the year 2000, to bring together public & private sectors globally to improve access to new vaccines for children in developing countries. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Leo, tunasherehekea ushirikiano wetu na @gavi , muungano wa kimataifa wa chanjo, ulioanzishwa mwaka wa 2000, ili kuleta pamoja sekta za umma na za kibinafsi duniani kote ili kuboresha upatikanaji wa chanjo mpya kwa watoto katika nchi zinazoendelea. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Development of a COVID-19 vaccine is a process to ensure its safety and efficacy; Ag DG @DrPatrickAmoth . #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Uundaji wa chanjo ya COVID-19 ni mchakato wa kuhakikisha usalama na utendakazi wake; Ag DG @DrPatrickAmoth . #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Health Chief Administrative Secretary, Dr. Rashid Aman, today flagged off vehicles procured through the support of @gavi to boost the national vaccine & immunization program activities in the Counties of Garissa, Lamu, Mandera, Wajir, West Pokot & Nandi. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Utawala wa Afya, Dkt. Rashid Aman, leo ameashiria magari yaliyonunuliwa kupitia usaidizi wa @gavi ili kuimarisha shughuli za mpango wa kitaifa wa chanjo na chanjo katika Kaunti za Garissa, Lamu, Mandera, Wajir, Pokot Magharibi na Nandi. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Our researches @KEMRI_Kenya are involved in research to find a vaccine for COVID-19; President Uhuru Kenyatta. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Tafiti zetu @KEMRI_Kenya zinahusika katika utafiti wa kupata chanjo ya COVID-19; Rais Uhuru Kenyatta. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Be careful about where you get information about COVID-19. Promises of a guaranteed cure to prevent COVID-19 are not accurate. As of now, there is no vaccine for COVID-19. Please continue to use MOH & WHO websites for information on how to help prevent COVID-19. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Kuwa mwangalifu kuhusu mahali unapopata maelezo kuhusu COVID-19. Ahadi za tiba ya uhakika ya kuzuia COVID-19 si sahihi. Kufikia sasa, hakuna chanjo ya COVID-19. Tafadhali endelea kutumia tovuti za MOH & WHO kwa maelezo kuhusu jinsi ya kusaidia kuzuia COVID-19. #KomeshaCorona

English: Don’t believe the myth that a vaccine for COVID-19 is available #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Usiamini imani potofu kwamba chanjo ya COVID-19 inapatikana #KomeshaCorona

English: specialized hospitals like Othaya & KU Teaching Research & Referral Hospital HPV & Malaria vaccine strengthened HRM by expanding KMTC review of national pharmaceutical policy Cuban doctors mental health taskforce NHIF & Kemsa reforms
Swahili: hospitali maalum kama Othaya & KU Kufundisha Utafiti na Hospitali ya Rufaa ya HPV & Malaria chanjo iliimarishwa HRM kwa kupanua ukaguzi wa KMTC wa sera ya kitaifa ya dawa Madaktari wa Cuba kikosi kazi cha afya ya akili NHIF & Kemsa

English: In the last one year @MOH_Kenya has installed equipment & infrastructure in over 3,000 Health Facilities to support the new vaccine introduction. A Further, 1,000 Health facilities will be equipped in the next 1 year...Dr Rashid #STOPCervicalCancer @KenyaGovernors @UNICEFKenya
Swahili: Katika mwaka mmoja uliopita @MOH_Kenya imeweka vifaa na miundombinu katika Vituo vya Afya zaidi ya 3,000 ili kusaidia utangulizi mpya wa chanjo. A Zaidi, vituo 1,000 vya Afya vitawekwa vifaa katika muda wa mwaka mmoja ujao...Dr Rashid #STOPCervicalCancer @KenyaGovernors @UNICEFKenya

English: Kenya is one of the few African countries to have introduced the HPV vaccine free of charge into routine immunization schedules. The Vaccine targets girls who are currently 10 years old & subsequently to all girls as they turn 10 years @WHOKenya @UNICEFKenya #STOPCervicalCancer
Swahili: Kenya ni mojawapo ya nchi chache za Kiafrika ambazo zimeanzisha chanjo ya HPV bila malipo katika ratiba za kawaida za chanjo. Chanjo hiyo inalenga wasichana ambao kwa sasa wana umri wa miaka 10 na kisha wasichana wote wanapofikisha miaka 10 @WHOKenya @UNICEFKenya #STOPCervicalCancer

English: @MOH_Kenya CAS Dr Rashid Aman flags off the National Cervical Cancer Awareness walk in Makueni County. 34% of girls have received HPV vaccine in county & target is 100% by March #StopCervicalCancer @WHOKenya @Cancerinkenya @Women4Cancer @KancoKE @BeyondZeroKenya @MaryNyangasi
Swahili: @MOH_Kenya CAS Dkt Rashid Aman akipeperusha bendera ya matembezi ya Kitaifa ya Kuelimisha Saratani ya Shingo ya Kizazi katika Kaunti ya Makueni. Asilimia 34 ya wasichana wamepokea chanjo ya HPV katika kaunti na lengo ni 100% kufikia Machi #StopCervicalCancer @WHOKenya @Cancerinkenya @Women4Cancer @KancoKE @BeyondZeroKenya @MaryNyangasi

English: @DrMercyHealth A scaling of these joint investments has seen a further expansion of our immunization programs through the introduction of 6 new vaccines in the past decade, all of which are contributing to the reduction of childhood diseases and deaths. #CoronaVirusUpdates
Swahili: @DrMercyHealth Kuongezeka kwa uwekezaji huu wa pamoja kumesaidia kupanuka zaidi kwa programu zetu za chanjo kupitia kuanzishwa kwa chanjo 6 mpya katika muongo mmoja uliopita, ambazo zote zinachangia kupunguza magonjwa na vifo vya watoto. Taarifa za #CoronaVirus

English: @DrMercyHealth . Kenya has eliminated Maternal & Neonatal Tetanus disease , eradicated Wild Polio Virus through the implementation of the National Immunization Program in collaborative investment with development partners #CoronaVirusUpdates
Swahili: @DrMercyHealth . Kenya imetokomeza ugonjwa wa Pepopunda kwa akina mama na watoto wachanga, kutokomeza Virusi vya Polio Pori kupitia utekelezaji wa Mpango wa Kitaifa wa Chanjo katika uwekezaji shirikishi na washirika wa maendeleo #CoronaVirusUpdates

English: CS Mutahi Kagwe.Kakamega County has successfully managed its cases of malaria, achieved 80 percent coverage when it comes to immunization of children & managed to establish five treatment centers that have been prepared to handle the Covid-19 pandemic outbreak. @CountyKakamega
Swahili: Waziri Mutahi Kagwe.Kaunti ya Kakamega imefanikiwa kudhibiti visa vyake vya ugonjwa wa malaria, na kufikia asilimia 80 ya chanjo ya watoto na imeweza kuanzisha vituo vitano vya matibabu ambavyo vimetayarishwa kushughulikia janga la Covid-19. @KauntiKakamega

English: . @NMS_Kenya ’s Health promotion officer Rachael Mbae engaging Bodaboda riders in Umoja estate on Rider & Client hygiene to #KomeshaCorona They also delved on WHY Male involvement in routine child immunization activities is KEY
Swahili: . Afisa wa uendelezaji wa Afya wa @NMS_Kenya Rachael Mbae akiwashirikisha waendesha Bodaboda katika mtaa wa Umoja kuhusu usafi wa Rider & Mteja kwa #KomeshaCorona Pia walijadili kwa nini ushiriki wa wanaume katika shughuli za kawaida za chanjo ya watoto ni MUHIMU.

English: Lagdera Sub-County Community Health Focal person Issa Hajj sensitizing herders on COVID-19 at Ohiyo water point. He also distributed masks & provided immunization services. #KomeshaCorona @garissacounty2
Swahili: Msimamizi wa Afya ya Jamii katika Kaunti Ndogo ya Lagdera Issa Hajj akiwahamasisha wafugaji kuhusu COVID-19 katika kituo cha maji cha Ohio. Pia alisambaza barakoa na kutoa huduma za chanjo. #KomeshaCorona @garissacounty2

English: I would like to emphasize the importance of Immunization & its linkage to Universal Health Coverage. I am appealing to mothers to ensure children are immunized, even as we grapple with the COVID-19 Pandemic; CS Mutahi Kagwe. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Ningependa kusisitiza umuhimu wa Chanjo na uhusiano wake na Huduma ya Afya kwa Wote. Ninatoa wito kwa akina mama kuhakikisha watoto wanapata chanjo, hata tunapopambana na Gonjwa la COVID-19; CS Mutahi Kagwe. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: H.E President Uhuru Kenyatta, in 2019, took up the role of Gavi Champion in support of the Gavi replenishment. This is due to his commitment to immunization & improving the lives of children, & his leadership in the global movement for Universal Health Coverage.
Swahili: Rais Uhuru Kenyatta, mnamo 2019, alichukua jukumu la Bingwa wa Gavi kuunga mkono ujanibishaji wa Gavi. Hii ni kutokana na kujitolea kwake katika chanjo na kuboresha maisha ya watoto, na uongozi wake katika vuguvugu la kimataifa la Huduma ya Afya kwa Wote.

English: The successes of immunization, facilitated by this assistance, have led to tremendous improvement in child survival rates in our country, keeping the promise of a prosperous, and healthy future of our Nation. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Mafanikio ya chanjo, yaliyowezeshwa na msaada huu, yamesababisha uboreshaji mkubwa wa viwango vya maisha ya watoto katika nchi yetu, na kutimiza ahadi ya mustakabali mzuri na wenye afya wa Taifa letu. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Committing to sustaining immunization systems, Kitui county is sensitizing religious leaders in all sub-counties in the context of COVID-19 pandemic courtesy of KANCO. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Kwa kujitolea kudumisha mifumo ya chanjo, kaunti ya Kitui inawahamasisha viongozi wa kidini katika kaunti zote ndogo katika muktadha wa janga la COVID-19 kwa hisani ya KANCO. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: It is #immunizationweek and Nairobi County Health Team is doing a great thing by providing supportive supervision to the city health centres. Today they were at Nairobi South Health Centre assessing Covid19 IPC & Response, Immunization & other Programs. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Ni #wiki ya chanjo na Timu ya Afya ya Kaunti ya Nairobi inafanya jambo kubwa kwa kutoa usimamizi wa usaidizi kwa vituo vya afya vya jiji. Leo walikuwa katika Kituo cha Afya cha Nairobi South wakitathmini Covid19 IPC & Response, Chanjo na Mipango mingine. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Supportive Supervision at Loco Health Centre by the Nairobi County Health Team as part of the world Immunization week, to ensure Infection prevention control & immunisation guidelines are followed during COVID 19 Pandemic. #KomeshaCorona update

English: @MOH_Kenya has directed all the 47 counties to identify & designate a COVID-19 hospital, for other hospitals to continue offering other services such as maternal & child health, immunization, reproductive health, TB & HIV services; Dr. Patrick Amoth, DG Health. #KomeshaCorona

English: Masks are a simple barrier to help prevent your respiratory droplets from reaching others. Studies show that masks reduce the spray of droplets when worn over the nose and mouth. #KomeshaCorona #WearAMask x.com/ExplainerKE/st …

English: This year’s awareness week theme is “United to Prevent drug resistance,” & the focus is on changing from "antibiotics" to the more encompassing and inclusive term "antimicrobials."
Swahili: Mandhari ya wiki ya uhamasishaji ya mwaka huu ni "Kuungana Kuzuia Ukinzani wa dawa," na lengo ni kubadilisha kutoka "antibiotics" hadi neno linalojumuisha na kujumuisha zaidi "antimicrobials."

English: CAS, Dr. Rashid.A report by @WHO indicates that, the number of suicides cases reported in the Country rose by 58 % between 2008 & 2017. 317 suicide cases reported every year.The increased reported cases of suicide in Kenya needs urgent measures to prevent suicide.
Swahili: CAS, Dk. Rashid.Ripoti ya @WHO inaonyesha kwamba, idadi ya visa vya watu kujitoa mhanga vilivyoripotiwa Nchini iliongezeka kwa 58% kati ya 2008 na 2017. Visa 317 vya kujitoa mhanga viliripotiwa kila mwaka. Kuongezeka kwa visa vya kujiua vilivyoripotiwa nchini Kenya vinahitaji hatua za haraka ili kuzuia kujiua.

English: Join us on 10th September at 12pm EAT for a webinar on working together to prevent suicide. @MOHmentalhealth @irsan_omar @Dr_chitayi @ImmaculateKara2 @SML_kenya @chaolafemefatal @letsbonga @mainawrachel . link.... bit.ly/3gL7mTu #suicidepreventionke

English: C-HERP project is designed to assist countries to prevent, detect and respond to the threat posed by COVID-19, and to strengthen the national systems for public health preparedness and responsiveness. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Mradi wa C-HERP umeundwa ili kusaidia nchi kuzuia, kugundua na kukabiliana na tishio linaloletwa na COVID-19, na kuimarisha mifumo ya kitaifa ya kujiandaa na kuitikia afya ya umma. #KomeshaCorona

English: These numbers show that it is only a matter of time before all the counties record a COVID-19 case. Let us not panic but rather strictly adhere to the containment measures, to prevent widespread infections within the counties. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Nambari hizi zinaonyesha kuwa ni suala la muda tu kabla ya kaunti zote kurekodi kisa cha COVID-19. Wacha tusiwe na hofu bali tufuate kabisa hatua za kuzuia, ili kuzuia maambukizo yaliyoenea katika kaunti. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: #COVID19 Myth Vs Fact. Myth Eating garlic helps prevent infection with the coronavirus. Fact Garlic is a healthy food that may have some antimicrobial properties. However, there is no evidence that eating garlic has protected people from #COVID19. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Hadithi za #COVID19 Vs Ukweli. Hadithi Kula kitunguu saumu husaidia kuzuia maambukizi ya virusi vya corona. Ukweli Kitunguu saumu ni chakula chenye afya ambacho kinaweza kuwa na mali ya antimicrobial. Walakini, hakuna ushahidi kwamba kula kitunguu saumu kumewalinda watu dhidi ya #COVID19. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: #COVID19 Myth Vs Fact. Myth Regularly rinsing your nose with saline can help prevent infection with the #COVID19. Fact No. There is no evidence that regularly rinsing the nose with saline has protected people from infection with the #COVID19. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Hadithi za #COVID19 Vs Ukweli. Hadithi Kuosha pua yako mara kwa mara kwa chumvi kunaweza kusaidia kuzuia maambukizi ya #COVID19. Ukweli Hapana. Hakuna ushahidi kwamba kuosha pua mara kwa mara kwa chumvi kumelinda watu dhidi ya kuambukizwa #COVID19. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: #COVID19 Myth Vs Fact. Myth Gargling warm salty water can help prevent #COVID19. Fact Respiratory viruses are not impacted by saltwater, data on such conditions show. Some claims that gargling with bleach or ethanol can help are also false & dangerous. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Hadithi za #COVID19 Vs Ukweli. Hadithi ya Gargling maji moto yenye chumvi inaweza kusaidia kuzuia #COVID19. Ukweli kwamba virusi vya kupumua haviathiriwi na maji ya chumvi, data juu ya hali kama hizo zinaonyesha. Baadhi ya madai kwamba kusugua na bleach au ethanol kunaweza kusaidia pia ni uwongo na hatari. #KomeshaCorona

English: #COVID19 Myth Vs Fact. Myth Taking a hot bath can prevent the new coronavirus disease. Fact Taking a hot bath will not prevent you from catching #COVID19. Your normal body temperature remains around 36.5 to 37C, regardless of the temperatures of your bath. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Hadithi za #COVID19 Vs Ukweli. Hadithi Kuoga kwa maji moto kunaweza kuzuia ugonjwa mpya wa coronavirus. Ukweli Kuoga kwa moto hautakuzuia kuambukizwa #COVID19. Joto lako la kawaida la mwili husalia kati ya 36.5 hadi 37C, bila kujali halijoto ya kuoga kwako. #KomeshaCorona

English: We are focused on slowing the spread of the virus. Hand washing, social distancing, wearing of masks, coughing etiquette among others are some of the best practices to prevent the spread. Let us work together to #KomeshaCorona in x.com/kemboi_robbin/ …
Swahili: Tunalenga kupunguza kasi ya kuenea kwa virusi. Kunawa mikono, kutengwa kwa jamii, kuvaa barakoa, adabu za kukohoa miongoni mwa zingine ni baadhi ya njia bora za kuzuia kuenea. Tushirikiane #KomeshaCorona katika x.com/kemboi_robbin/ …

English: Targeted testing is ongoing. Stay safe and observe the containment measures to prevent the spread of the virus #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Upimaji unaolengwa unaendelea. Kaa salama na uzingatie hatua za kujikinga ili kuzuia kuenea kwa virusi vya #KomeshaCorona

English: Residents of St Teresa Primary school Mlango Kubwa, turned up in large numbers for the free targeted COVID-19 testing to prevent the transmission of the virus in the area. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Wakaazi wa shule ya msingi ya St Teresa Mlango Kubwa, walijitokeza kwa wingi kwa ajili ya upimaji wa bure wa COVID-19 uliolengwa ili kuzuia maambukizi ya virusi katika eneo hilo. #KomeshaCorona

English: Don’ts to prevent #COVID19; Avoid Close Contact with anyone Do Not Spit Do Not Use Over The Counter Medicines Don’t Panic, Take It Easy Don’t travel unless necessary Don’t spread misinformation verbally or through communication platforms #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Usizuie #COVID19; Epuka Kuwasiliana kwa Ukaribu na mtu yeyote Usimtemee Mate Usitumie Dawa kwenye Kaunta Usiogope, Chukua Rahisi Usisafiri isipokuwa lazima Usisambaze habari potofu kwa maneno au kupitia majukwaa ya mawasiliano #KomeshaCorona

English: You can help prevent the spread of respiratory diseases like #COVID19 if you do the following. #StayHomeHero #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: Unaweza kusaidia kuzuia kuenea kwa magonjwa ya kupumua kama #COVID19 ukifanya yafuatayo. #KaaNyumbaniShujaa #KomeshaCorona

English: COVID-19 is a respiratory illness caused by a new virus. Symptoms include fever, coughing, a sore throat and shortness of breath. This virus can spread from person to person, but good hygiene can prevent infection. #KomeshaCorona
Swahili: COVID-19 ni ugonjwa wa kupumua unaosababishwa na virusi vipya. Dalili ni pamoja na homa, kukohoa, koo na upungufu wa kupumua. Virusi hivi vinaweza kuenea kutoka kwa mtu mmoja hadi mwingine, lakini usafi unaweza kuzuia maambukizi. #KomeshaCorona

English: All the cases are stable. They are in isolation to prevent infections. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Kesi zote ziko thabiti. Wanajitenga ili kuzuia maambukizo. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

Swahili: Kufanya mazoezi ya usafi kunaweza kusaidia kuzuia uchafuzi wa barakoa. Nawa mikono yako kabla na baada ya kuvaa barakoa. #KomeshaCorona

English: @GarissaGov is an example of successful implementation & institutionalization of MPDSR, that focuses on linking information & response, ensuring responses are taken based on data to prevent avoidable maternal & perinatal mortality happening in the future. #KomeshaCorona

English: Our teams are continuing with the targeted testing exercise in areas we have identified as hotspots, such as Kawangware, Eastleigh & Mvita in Mombasa County to identify & isolate the infected in order to prevent further transmission. #KomeshaCorona

Swahili: CS Kagwe: @KisumuCountyKE ilifanya vyema katika matumizi ya teknolojia kupitia majukwaa kama vile SMS nyingi na vituo vya simu vya saa 24 kama njia mwafaka ya kuhamasisha watu kuhusu COVID-19 na gari linaloipa Jumuiya usaidizi unaohitajika wakati wa dharura.

English: Together, WE CAN OVERCOME, Together, WE ARE STRONGER. Call #719 if you need help. #KomeshaCorona update.

English: The Kenya Injectable Free Regimens policy speaks to the rollout of a regimen for treatment of MDR-TB that is devoid of injections in line with the WHO’s call to eliminate injectables from the MDR-TB treatment regimen to improve treatment outcomes. @WHOKenya @NTLDKenya
Swahili: Sera ya Kenya Sindano Bure Regimens inazungumzia kuanzishwa kwa regimen ya matibabu ya MDR-TB ambayo haina sindano kulingana na wito wa WHO wa kuondoa sindano kutoka kwa regimen ya matibabu ya MDR-TB ili kuboresha matokeo ya matibabu. @WHOKenya @NTLDKenya

English: In the event that one's condition deteriorates, then they should call 719, or send a SMS to *719#, or, notify the designated health care worker. #KomeshaCorona update.

English: We glad that majority of Kenyans have responded to our call to come forward for testing. This is commendable & we continue to appeal to all Kenyans to come out and get tested. #KomeshaCorona update.
Swahili: Tunafurahi kwamba Wakenya wengi wameitikia wito wetu wa kujitokeza kupima. Hili ni jambo la kupongezwa na tunaendelea kutoa wito kwa Wakenya wote kujitokeza kupima. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: To recognize the wonderful work of Nurses around the country, we call upon our stakeholders to invest & support the nursing profession. We also appreciate all partners we have come out to support healthcare workers in various ways. #KomeshaCorona updates.
Swahili: Ili kutambua kazi nzuri ya Wauguzi kote nchini, tunatoa wito kwa wadau wetu kuwekeza na kuunga mkono taaluma ya uuguzi. Pia tunawashukuru washirika wote ambao tumejitokeza kusaidia wahudumu wa afya kwa njia mbalimbali. #KomeshaCorona sasisho.

English: Our nurses have been at the front line in this fight against COVID-19 as the first point of call in our health facilities. They tremendously sacrifice every day despite the risk of contracting the virus to ensure those infected are taken care of; Dr. Aman. #KomeshaCorona update
Swahili: Wauguzi wetu wamekuwa mstari wa mbele katika vita hivi dhidi ya COVID-19 kama hatua ya kwanza ya wito katika vituo vyetu vya afya. Wanajitolea sana kila siku licha ya hatari ya kuambukizwa virusi ili kuhakikisha walioambukizwa wanatunzwa; Dk Aman. #KomeshaCorona sasisho

English: Safaricom Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Peter Ndegwa today paid a courtesy call on the Cabinet Secretary for Health, Hon. Mutahi Kagwe and explored areas of partnership in regard to COVID-19. @SafaricomPLC is currently hosting the COVID-19 call centre. #KomeshaCorona Update.

English: In cognizant of the measures we have taken to fight #COVID19, we have witnessed a spike in Domestic violence, Gender-based violence & Sexual Offences. As we address the issue through relevant agencies we call on Kenyans to focus on fighting the virus not violence #KomeshaCorona

Tunaposhughulikia suala hilo kupitia mashirika husika tunatoa wito kwa Wakenya kuzingatia kupambana na virusi hivyo wala si ghasia #KomeshaCorona

English: The current threat is set to impact all of us in one form or another and stronger local connections within communities are vital to see this crisis out. That is way we have joined forces with partners to call on people everywhere to take positive action to #KomeshaCorona

English: What should I do if I have symptoms? If you have a fever, coughing and shortness of breath, call 719. Contacting us first helps us protect you and others. Visit health.go.ke to learn more about the symptoms of COVID-19. #KomeshaCorona

English: @WHOKenya Country Representative Dr. Rudolf Eggers today paid a courtesy call on the Cabinet Secretary for Health Hon. Mutahi Kagwe at Afya House.
Swahili: @WHOKenya Mwakilishi wa Nchi Dkt Rudolf Eggers leo amemtembelea Katibu wa Baraza la Mawaziri wa Afya Mhe. Mutahi Kagwe akiwa Afya House.

English: “I call upon the youth to continue the good gesture as you are our future leaders and must lead from the front towards making a real impact which might one day save the life of friend, of a loved one and possibly, your very own life...” Dr Mwangangi, CAS Health
Swahili: "Natoa wito kwa vijana kuendeleza ishara nzuri kama nyinyi ni viongozi wetu wa baadaye na lazima muongoze kutoka mbele kuelekea kuleta athari ya kweli ambayo siku moja inaweza kuokoa maisha ya rafiki, mpendwa na pengine, maisha yako mwenyewe..." Dk Mwangangi, CAS Health

English: Health Cabinet Secretary Mutahi Kagwe today met with Kenya High Commissioner to United Republic of Tanzania Ambassador Dan Kasungu who paid him a courtesy call at his Afya house office @DanMKazungu
Swahili: Katibu wa Baraza la Mawaziri wa Afya Mutahi Kagwe leo amekutana na Kamishna Mkuu wa Kenya katika Jamhuri ya Muungano wa Tanzania Balozi Dan Kasungu ambaye alimtembelea katika ofisi yake ya Afya house @DanMKazungu

English: Members of the public are advised against forwarding unsubstantiated information on social media platforms. For any inquiries related to COVID-19, please call the Ministry of Health on the following Hotlines: 0800721316, 0732353535, 0729471414. x.com/DanielN6184157 …
Swahili: Wanachama wanashauriwa dhidi ya kusambaza habari zisizo na uthibitisho kwenye majukwaa ya mitandao ya kijamii. Kwa maswali yoyote yanayohusiana na COVID-19, tafadhali piga simu kwa Wizara ya Afya kwa nambari za simu zifuatazo: 0800721316, 0732353535, 0729471414. x.com/DanielN6184157 …

English: The Chief Administrative Secretary, Dr. Mercy Mwangangi paid a courtesy call to the Amb. Flora Karugu Kenya High Commissioner in Zambia & deliberated on outcomes of the 69th ECSA-HC & issues of regional collaboration on improving Adolescent & Young People's Health @KenyainZambia
Swahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Utawala, Dkt. Mercy Mwangangi alitembelea Amb. Flora Karugu Kamishna Mkuu wa Kenya nchini Zambia na kujadiliana kuhusu matokeo ya Mkutano wa 69 wa ECSA-HC na masuala ya ushirikiano wa kikanda kuhusu kuboresha Afya ya Vijana na Vijana @KenyainZambia

English: #CoronaVirusKenya We call upon Kenyans who have traveled to China for the past two weeks to check themselves in various health facilities close to them as the incubation period for this virus is two weeks @BBCWorld @RadioCitizenFM @KBCChannel1 @CapitalFMKenya @GhettoRadio895

English: Taskforce on Mental Health National Convention public hearing LAST CALL for Presentations - Monday 27th January 2020 @KICC_kenya at 9.00am @WHOKenya @Kahongeks @syengomutisya @LukoyeAtwoli @Dr_chitayi @DrNjengaFrank @IAsin @JNJAfrica @ChiromoLMC @NaiMentalHealth @NaiParenting

English: It’s time to change mental health in Kenya. Today the Taskforce on Mental Health public participation meeting was held in Nyeri YMCA Hall after a courtesy call on Governor Mutahi Kahiga & Regional Commissioners @syengomutisya @kenya_mental @Drsimonnjuguna2 @IAsin @JNJAfrica
Swahili: Ni wakati wa kubadilisha afya ya akili nchini Kenya. Leo mkutano wa Kikosi Kazi kuhusu Afya ya Akili ulifanyika katika Ukumbi wa YMCA wa Nyeri baada ya kumuenzi Gavana Mutahi Kahiga na Wakuu wa Mikoa @syengomutisya @kenya_mental @Drsimonnjuguna2 @IAsin @JNJAfrica

English: The taskforce on Mental health led by Prof. Lukoye Atwoli today held its public participation sitting at Kisumu Town Hall after paying a courtesy call on Kisumu Deputy Governor Dr. Mathew Owili. @kenya_mental @syengomutisya @IAsin @JNJAfrica @LukoyeAtwoli @ChiromoLMC @G_Mbugua1
Swahili: Kikosi kazi kuhusu Afya ya Akili kikiongozwa na Prof. Lukoye Atwoli leo kilifanya ushiriki wake wa umma katika Ukumbi wa Mji wa Kisumu baada ya kumtembelea Naibu Gavana wa Kisumu Dkt. Mathew Owili. @kenya_mental @syengomutisya @IAsin @JNJAfrica @LukoyeAtwoli @ChiromoLMC @G_Mbugua1

English: January is #CervicalHealthAwareness Month as Kenya joins the call to eradicate cervical cancer. In Kenya cervical cancer is a leading cause of morbidity & mortality with 9 women dying of cervical cancer every day yet it is a completely preventable cancer. Get screened. Regularly.
Swahili: Januari ni Mwezi wa #Mwezi wa Uhamasishaji wa Afya ya Kizazi huku Kenya ikijiunga na mwito wa kutokomeza saratani ya mlango wa kizazi. Nchini Kenya saratani ya shingo ya kizazi ndiyo inayoongoza kwa magonjwa na vifo huku wanawake 9 wakifariki kila siku kwa saratani ya shingo ya kizazi ilhali ni saratani inayoweza kuzuilika kabisa. Kaguliwa. Mara kwa mara.

English: Members of the task force on mental health led by Prof. Lukoye Atwoli paid a courtesy call to Uasin Gishu county CEC Evelyine Rotich before conducting public hearings at Uasin Gishu town Hall. The Taskforce also visited mental health patients at MTRH @syengomutisya @360mental
Swahili: Wanachama wa jopo kazi kuhusu afya ya akili wakiongozwa na Prof. Lukoye Atwoli walimtembelea CEC wa kaunti ya Uasin Gishu Eveline Rotich kabla ya kuendesha vikao vya umma katika Ukumbi wa mji wa Uasin Gishu. Kikosi Kazi pia kilitembelea wagonjwa wa afya ya akili katika MTRH @syengomutisya @360mental
